page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped directly to 16 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 1.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. It contains no graphics processing units and does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a one-to-one ratio of vCPUs to memory, the ecs.c2.medium is tailored for compute-heavy workloads that do not require large memory footprints. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. This hardware profile is suitable for compute-intensive tasks, batch processing, and highly parallelized workloads that fit within the 16.0 GB memory limit.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a 1.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, making it highly optimized for compute-bound tasks rather than memory-intensive applications. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage for data persistence. With dedicated CPU allocation, it delivers predictable performance for parallel processing, batch workloads, and computational tasks that operate within its specific memory constraints.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is a compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated physical cores, 16.0 GB of RAM, and KVM virtualization, designed for parallel processing workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for compute-heavy workloads.
tagline: A dedicated sixteen-core compute instance with a one-to-one ratio of processor cores to memory for parallelized computational workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated x86_64 physical cores with single-thread execution
16.0 GB of system memory providing 1.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
No bundled local storage or integrated GPU resources
Designed for compute-intensive and parallel processing workloads
